JOI-COSMIC_ORIGIN_RELIC.title: Cosmic Origin
JOI-COSMIC_ORIGIN_RELIC.description: Reduce all incoming damage by 50%. When damage is reduced by this relic, gain [gold]Black Hole[/gold] equal to the amount reduced. [gold]Axis Core[/gold] can store one Attack card and plays it at the start of your turn.
JOI-COSMIC_ORIGIN_RELIC.flavor: The origin and end of all things.
JOI-COSMIC_APEX_RELIC.title: Cosmic Apex
JOI-COSMIC_APEX_RELIC.description: Reduce all incoming damage by 50%. When damage is reduced by this relic, gain [gold]Black Hole[/gold] and [gold]White Hole[/gold] equal to the amount reduced. [gold]Axis Core[/gold] can store one Attack card and plays it at the start of your turn.
JOI-COSMIC_APEX_RELIC.flavor: The universe converges at its peak.
